title: catevala × tortuosa
intro: Catevala × tortuosa, also known as the Tortuous or Twisted Honeysuckle, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Catevala × tortuosa include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, including respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
